mapper.select: SELECT t1.city_name, t1.temperature, t1.humidity, t1.wind_speed, t1.weather, t1.aqi, t1.aqi_level, t1.record_time FROM biz_weather_record t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT city_name, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM biz_weather_record WHERE record_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE GROUP BY city_name ) t2 ON t1.city_name = t2.city_name AND t1.id = t2.max_id ORDER BY t1.city_name
SELECT city_name, province, alert_type, alert_level, metric_field, alert_value, weather_desc, alert_time FROM extreme_weather_alert ORDER BY alert_time DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT stat_date AS date, (wind_count + rain_count) AS count FROM aviation_daily_stats WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) ORDER BY stat_date
SELECT stat_date AS date, wind_count AS wind, rain_count AS rain FROM aviation_daily_stats WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT city_name, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(alert_time)) AS alert_days, 100 - COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(alert_time)) * 14 AS score FROM extreme_weather_alert WHERE alert_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND city_name IN ('北京','上海','广州','成都','深圳','昆明','西安','武汉','乌鲁木齐','哈尔滨') GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY alert_days ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT DATE(alert_time) AS date, city_name, alert_level, alert_type FROM extreme_weather_alert WHERE alert_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND city_name IN ('北京','上海','广州','成都','深圳','昆明','西安','武汉','乌鲁木齐','哈尔滨') ORDER BY date, city_name
